steps.title: Multiply both sides by 23u to isolate p
steps.content:
Starting with $n = \frac{p}{23u}$, multiply both sides by $23u$:

$$n \cdot 23u = \frac{p}{23u} \cdot 23u$$

steps.title: Simplify both sides
steps.content:
On the right side, the $23u$ cancels the denominator, leaving $p$. On the left side, multiply $n$ and $23u$:

$$23un = p$$

Therefore, $p = 23un$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
